text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check out the moderator guidelines and don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions!

Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Event Helper role. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events — check your role channels for next steps!

Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Mentor role. We're so glad to have your expertise here — please introduce yourself in the mentors channel and get ready to make a difference!
